title: fritillaria tenella var. intermedia
intro: Fritillaria tenella var. intermedia, also known as the small or dwarf fritillaria, is a variety of the Fritillaria tenella species, a type of flowering plant in the lily family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Fritillaria tenella var. intermedia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as potential anti-tumor and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
